subject: FW: Emailing: IMG_1323, IMG_1324, IMG_1325, IMG_1326, IMG_1327, IMG_1328, IMG_1329, IMG_1330, IMG_1331
body:
Valdson is working on the new little apt in Paris - these are not v
excting pics but I though I'd forward them to you anyway

-----Original Message-----
From: Valdson COTRIN [mailto:valdson.cotrin@free.fr] 
Sent: Thursday, December 20, 2007 5:08 AM
To: Ghislaine
Subject: Emailing: IMG_1323, IMG_1324, IMG_1325, IMG_1326, IMG_1327,
IMG_1328, IMG_1329, IMG_1330, IMG_1331

madame bonjour.
voici des nouvelle photos des travaux des la chambre de service.
bien a vous.
valdson.Your files are attached and ready to send with this message.
